# Sign Topper Replacement Sign

Sign Topper Replacement signs are printed in full color on 4mm corrugated plastic material. The plastic has hollow flutes on the inside of the material, similar to cardboard, but much more durable. It is lightweight, plastic and waterproof. Single sided signs only have text, images or graphics on one side of the sign.

*   [Create your Product](#cust)
*   [Material](#f4b5afe9-950a-43a4-a3c5-a8513f3bd3fc)
*   [Artwork](#06938659-4481-4e78-8a5d-930ce3aab11f)
*   [Order Process](#cc613954-42b6-4064-8824-26904690b169)

*   [Assembly](#2d75b510-4a3d-4333-9244-c8ea2662b9c1)

_Click on a template to customize your product_

### 4mm Coroplast Material

Sign Toppers are made of out corrugated plastic. Corrugated plastic is sometimes referred to as "plastic cardboard" because of the hollow "flutes" on the inside of the material. Yard signs are lightweight, plastic and waterproof. They are a great form of outdoor advertising.

 [**Click here to request a sample packet of materials**](https://www.banners.com/sample-packet-request)

#### 4mm Coroplast Features:

*   Standard 4 mm thickness
*   Full color printed signs
*   Printed with a 1/2" white edge
*   Slightly ribbed surface
*   Waterproof
*   Can withstand extreme hot and cold temperatures
*   Lasts up to 2 years outdoors
*   Add unlimited text, colors, logos, and graphics

[Create Your Product](#cust)

### Artwork Guidelines

The file that prints best is .eps converted to outline. We can also print high resolution .pdf, .tif, and .jpg formats. If you don’t have access to or are unsure if you have a high-resolution file, our professional graphic designers will be happy to assist with this. 

#### Order Proofs

If you are looking to be able to give your order one last look and make sure all the information and images are correct, requesting an order proof will allow you that benefit. Your order proof will include a low-resolution image of your artwork, a summary of your order including pricing, and your billing and shipping information. Please note if you receive a proof, you will need to email or call back your customer service representative with approval before your order will go into production.

#### Color Match Proof System

If your project is color critical, we highly recommend using our Color Match Proof System, as this is the best way to ensure the color match for your specific project. For more details please contact our team of friendly Customer Service Representatives who are all professional graphic designers to assist you with any questions you might have.

Did we answer all of your questions? If not, please give us a call and one of our customer service representatives would be happy to help. 320.391.5300

[Create Your Product](#cust)

### Ordering Process

You can design your sign online using our online designer, upload your own print ready artwork files or work with one of our graphic designers to create a custom yard sign.

#### Online Designer

*   Pick a template and design yard sign
*   Add to cart
*   Select yard sign finishing options
*   Select shipping method
*   Enter payment information
*   Order complete

#### Upload a File

*   Upload file
*   Add to cart
*   Select yard sign finishing options
*   Select shipping method
*   Proof is emailed to you
*   Once proof is approved & payment is received order is complete

#### Let us Design

*   Upload any files & provide yard sign instructions
*   Designer will create a yard sign proof
*   Proof is emailed to you
*   Once proof is approved & payment is received order is complete

### Production Times

Once your order is approved and payment is received standard production time is 2-3 business days. Large quantity orders and large sign orders may require more time in production. After your sign is finished with production it will be shipped via UPS.

\*\*\* Orders approved after 5pm CST will be processed the following business day. \*\*\*

**Rush services are not available on yard signs.**

\*\*Please note during peak times ground shipments may take an extra day or two to ship dependent upon production schedules as all packages with upgraded shipping do take priority. So please order early or discuss with your representative your particular needs so we can ensure that we meet your individual requirements.

### Payment

All signs must be paid for prior to being put into production. We accept Visa, MasterCard, American Express and Discover cards. We also accept checks. Checks must be received before your order is put into production. [For more information on check orders, see our blog.](https://banners-com.blogspot.com/2013/05/online-orders-we-now-accept-checks.html)

We will not charge your credit card until you have approved your proof for your order.

[Create Your Product](#cust)

### Shipping Information

This product is made in our Minnesota Facility ONLY.

Shipping prices are determined by the weight of the package and the destination. Our shipping prices are calculated at a 3' x 4' maximum shipping size.

If you are located outside of the Continental United States, please contact us for a shipping quote.

We offer the following shipping methods:

*   Economy (5-10 Business Days)
*   Standard (3-5 Business Days)
*   Three Day (3 Business Days)
*   Two Day (2 Business Days)
*   Overnight (1 Business Day)
*   Freight (freight orders must be shipped to a commercial address)

Please call our staff for accurate shipping on large orders or oversize packages.

**You will receive a tracking number once your package has been shipped.**

After products have shipped, all shipping company terms and conditions apply for lost or delayed packages. We will not refund the yard sign cost if UPS or any other shipping company has a delay in your package. We recommend ordering your yard signs early.

Delays because of Acts of God or anything beyond our control will not result in shipping refunds. If the product is damaged in shipping, damaged goods must be returned, and then replacement product will be sent.

Lost packages will be replaced after shipping company confirms loss. This generally takes 7-10 business days after initial scheduled delivery.

Please order your yard signs early as we cannot control delivery after your product leaves our production facilities.

**International shipping Notes:**

For international shipments, customers must provide both shipping labels and customs documentation. Currently, we only accept international shipping labels from USPS and UPS. For more details, please contact our customer service team.

**Economy Shipping**

If choosing economy shipping please add in additional postal information such as P.O. Box in the "Address Two" field on the checkout page to help ensure delivery.

Using economy shipping can also add an additional 5 - 10 days, depending on where the package is being shipped to.

[Create Your Product](#cust)

#### Upload a Print Ready File

Please upload your 60 MB or smaller print ready file. Acceptable file formats include: .eps, .pdf, or high resolution .tiff or .jpg. Typically 300 dpi or higher resolution files work best.

**For files larger than 60 MB please call for instructions to insure the fastest service.**

## More About Sign Topper Replacement Signs

### Replacement Sign Material

Yard signs are made out of corrugated plastic. Corrugated plastic is sometimes referred to as "plastic cardboard" because of the hollow "flutes" on the inside of the material. yard signs are lightweight, plastic and waterproof. They are a great form of outdoor advertising.

## Why Choose Banners.com?

**Customer Service**

Our customer service is 100% in-house and comprised of friendly, professional graphic designers.

**Fast Turnaround**

Choose between a 1, 2, 3, or 5 day production time to complete your order on your schedule.

**Quality Products**

Our products are made with the finest materials available and printed using the latest technology.

**Live Order Tracking**

Track your order, every step of the way, with our proprietary Live Order Tracking system.
